mission_binding.public_summary: Complete the exact T3 Code Fast Follow evidence bundle through one durable real-provider Full Auto run with a visible Codex/Claude transition, restart-safe retention, terminal report/analyzer evidence, and no false parity, release, or public-capability claim.
mission_binding.reason_text_is_not_copied: The host packet includes local-only source location data. Exact digests bind the verbatim owner text without exposing local paths in this public-safe receipt.

handoff_request.reason: The artifact bundle is ready for an independent real Claude-lane continuity check. The host must perform the transition through its durable Full Auto lane mechanism; this provider cannot self-record a host transition.

completed_units: immutable manifest bound to exact source, target, authority, lesson, and directive identities
public source-only StudyPacket with five typed patterns
one evidence-only worktree creation proposal and four no_material_delta dispositions
bounded_context.next_lane_unit: Verify the artifact chain and mission digests from current main, confirm the host-provided handoff envelope names this run/thread and source/target lanes, then produce one public-safe Claude participation/transition receipt without claiming owner acceptance.
remaining_after_next_lane: independent issue #8978 and release issue #8979 remain separately owned

host_acceptance_conditions: The next mission packet has currentLane=fable-local.
The next mission packet has a non-null previousHandoff bound to this runRef and threadRef.
The handoff names codex-local as source and fable-local as target and is host-observed, not copied from provider prose.
The objective and done-condition digests remain exactly unchanged.
The target lane reads the committed artifact chain from current main and reports independent evidence rather than accepting Codex conclusions.
A missing, mismatched, stale, or prose-only handoff remains unverified and does not count as Claude participation.

local_control_diagnostic.reason: Starting or signaling another Desktop instance would create a parallel execution path and would not prove a transition in the host-authoritative run.
